sectionTitle.title: Our Main Services
sectionTitle.desc: High-quality dental care tailored to your needs for a brilliant smile.

service1.title: Oral & Dental Treatments
service1.description: From aesthetic enhancements to functional dental care tailored to your goals.

service2.title: Oral & Dental Care Procedures
service2.description: Precise, safe, and fully customized for each patient.

service3.title: Dental Prosthetic Services
service3.description: Custom-made solutions to restore both the aesthetics and function of your smile.

consultation.title: Not Sure Which Service Is Right For You?
consultation.description: Get in touch with us for a personalized consultation, we will guide you every step of the way.

hiw.title: How It Works
hiw.subtitle: Simple steps to a healthier and brighter smile

locations.title: Our Locations
locations.subtitle: Come visit us in our calm and welcoming space

depigmentation.title: Laser Gum Depigmentation
depigmentation.description: Laser treatment effectively removes dark spots and deep pigmentation from the gums, restoring a natural, healthy pink appearance.

eclaircissement.title: Teeth Brightening
eclaircissement.description: A professional treatment designed to eliminate deep stains and bring back brightness and freshness to your smile.

protheseTotale.title: Complete Removable Denture
protheseTotale.description: A comprehensive and comfortable solution to replace all missing teeth, restoring chewing function and facial aesthetics.

protheseFlexite.title: Flexite Partial Removable Denture
protheseFlexite.description: A modern, flexible denture made without visible metal clasps, offering absolute discretion and optimal daily comfort.

strassDentaire.title: Dental Crystal (Strass)
strassDentaire.description: Safe placement of a subtle and sparkling tooth jewel, done professionally without damaging the tooth enamel.

blanchiment.title: Teeth Whitening
blanchiment.description: In-office whitening treatment to safely brighten your teeth by several shades in just a single session.

intro.title: Smile Expert ?
intro.boldText: is a dental clinic where you will feel both relaxed (or secure) and well accompanied.
intro.expertise: With about 10 years of expertise, we offer comprehensive dental care in an environment filled with vitality, energy, and well-being.
intro.services: Whether you need a routine check-up, preventive treatment, aesthetic care, cellular regeneration, or more complex treatments, our experienced doctor is here to listen and meet all your needs.

tech.sectionTitle: Our Clinic Features the Latest Technologies

expertise.description: Dr. Sarra Haouet brings her expertise and passion to your smile. Always attentive, she combines medical precision with a human approach to offer each patient a unique and reassuring care experience.

ctaSplit.description: Schedule your visit today and take the first step towards a healthier and brighter smile.

contact.info_desc: Your smile is our priority. Contact us for any information or to book an appointment.

contact.schedule_subtitle: Find a time that suits you — our doors are open all week
